urdu transliteration text:
HAYE ZEHRA TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
Tanhai Ali Ki
english translation text: O Zahra, your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: HAYE GHAM MAY TERE JAATI RAHI BEENAYI ALI KI
english translation text: In your sorrow, Ali is losing his vision

urdu transliteration text: TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: DARBAR MAY ZAALIM KE GAYI BINTE PAYAMBAR
english translation text: The daughter of the Prophet went to court of the unjust

urdu transliteration text: KYA WAQT THA KUCH KAR NA SAKA FAATAHE KHYBER
english translation text: What a time that was? The conqueror of Khyber could not do anything

urdu transliteration text: HAYE HASTE RAHE GHURBAT PE TAMASHAYI ALI KI
english translation text: The audience laughed at the helplessness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: KEHTE THAY ALI ZEHRA SE KYA HAAL HAI BIBI
english translation text: Ali would ask Zahra about her state, to which she replied…

urdu transliteration text: AB HUM KO SALAM AAKE BHI KARTA NAHI KOI
english translation text: “No one even says Salam to us”

urdu transliteration text: HAYE HAI BAADE NABI KAISI PAZEERAYI ALI KI
english translation text: What a welcome Ali has received after the Prophet’s death?

urdu transliteration text: TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: DAR JALTA HUA FATEMA ZEHRA PE GIRAYA
english translation text: The burning door was slammed on Fatema Zahra (AS)

urdu transliteration text: MOHSIN KI SHAHADAT KA SABAB BANGAYI DUNYA
english translation text: The world became responsible for the shahadat of Mohsin (AS)

urdu transliteration text: HAYE TASVEER MUKAMMAL NAHI HO PAYI ALI KI
english translation text: Alas! The family of Ali remained incomplete

urdu transliteration text: TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: BAAHAR KABHI HUJRE MAY KABHI QABRE NABI PAR
english translation text: Sometimes in the chambers, sometimes at the grave of the Prophet…

urdu transliteration text: HAR RAAT KI TAREEKI MAY AULAAD SE CHUP KAR
english translation text: In the darkness of nights, hiding from his children…

urdu transliteration text:
HAYE NIKLI HAI TUJHE DHOONDNE BEENAYI ALI KI
Ali’s eyes are searching for you everywhere
TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text: ZAHRA KI JUDAI KO LAGAYE HUE DIL SE
english translation text: Keeping the separation of Zahra close to his heart…

urdu transliteration text:
PACHEES BARAS MAULA NE CHUP CHAAP GUZARE
Imam Ali kept silent for twenty five years
HAYE EK HUJRE MAY KUL DUNYA SIMAT AAYI ALI KI
english translation text: Imam Ali’s world was confined to just once chamber of the house

urdu transliteration text: TERI TANHAI HAI TANHAI ALI KI
english translation text: Your loneliness is the loneliness of Ali
